design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Navy Corporate meets Gold Leaf Luxury

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1, H2, and Hero text. Letter spacing -0.02em. Font weight 600 or 700.
usage_rules.subheadings: Use Manrope Uppercase, tracking-widest (0.2em), text-xs or text-sm. Color: Gold/Muted.
usage_rules.numbers: Use Manrope tabular-nums for all financial data and dates.

dashboard.grid_system: Bento Grid (Grid-cols-12). Widgets align to grid. Gap-6.

booking_page.background: Dark Navy with 'Abstract Gold Lines' faint overlay.
booking_page.card_style: Glassmorphism: bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-slate-950 hover:bg-[#B45309] rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-700 text-slate-200 hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide

cards.dashboard_widget: rounded-sm border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/50 p-6 hover:border-slate-700 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] rounded-sm h-12 text-slate-200 placeholder:text-slate-600

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-400 hover:text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-slate-800/50 rounded-sm transition-colors data-[active=true]:text-[#D4AF37] data-[active=true]:bg-slate-800/80 data-[active=true]:border-r-2 data-[active=true]:border-[#D4AF37]

animation_guidelines.page_transition: Initial fade-in + slight slide-up (opacity: 0->1, y: 20->0, duration: 0.6s, ease: outExpo)
animation_guidelines.hover_effects: Micro-interactions only. Buttons scale 1.02. Cards lift -4px.

implementation_steps: 1. Setup Tailwind config with 'colors.slate' as base and custom gold.
2. Install 'Manrope' and 'Playfair Display' via Google Fonts.
3. Create base layout components (Sidebar, DashboardShell, PublicBookingShell).
4. Customize Shadcn components (Button, Card, Input) to match 'components' rules.
5. Implement Booking Page with 'Wizard' step logic.
7. Add bilingual toggle logic (use simple React Context or Zustand).
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center }).
Always use modern button styles (pill or sharp).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
